author: SantiMod
content:
@All Pings 

Naabathon Sponsors and Prizes Update

It’s official, the Naabathon has $50,000 in prizes thanks to our incredible sponsors! 

Register what you’re building and get an exclusive Naabathon skin if your submission is valid. 

You only have until September 7 to register!

: https://naabathon.staratlas.com/
